perturbed_task_language: Put the plate on the top of the drawer
perturbation_semantics: Task instruction inverted: instead of base 'put bowl on plate', target is now 'put plate on top of wooden drawer'
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot expected to solve base task (place something else on plate), not place plate on drawer
strategy_notes: KITCHEN frame (eef home z=1.173). Localized plate via agentview: world_00.npy pixels around (185,110) gave world ~(0.06,-0.07,0.91); refined via wrist after move_to(0.10,-0.01,1.15) — wrist depth at pixel (120,95) gave (0.10,-0.01,0.92). First pi0_pick from (0.10,-0.01,1.05) appeared to succeed but gripper ended fully closed (no object held) — plate had shifted slightly to (0.02,-0.04). Re-localized via wrist color-segment of red rim. Second pi0_pick from (0.02,-0.04,1.05) succeeded with gripper opening 0.006m (matches plate-rim thickness): Pi0 grasped the plate by its rim, holding it vertically. Drawer top localized in agentview world map via z-mask (1.10<z<1.16): 5294 pixels spanning x[-0.40,+0.16] y[-0.35,-0.16] z=1.128, centroid world ~(0.025,-0.232,1.128). Carried plate at z=1.25 over drawer-top centroid, released at eef (0,-0.23,1.25); the predicate fired during release (plate dropped onto drawer top).
